tool_name: Flare Stack Thermal Radiation — Exclusion Zone, Flame Length & Stack Height

inputs.name: Flare Gas Lower Heating Value (LHV)
inputs.note: Natural gas ≈ 47500; H₂ ≈ 120000; propane ≈ 46000; refinery gas ≈ 40000 kJ/kg

inputs.name: Flare Combustion Efficiency (η_c)
inputs.note: USEPA AP-42 §13.5: well-designed elevated flare ≥ 98%; ground flare ≥ 99%

inputs.name: Fraction of Heat Radiated (F)
inputs.note: API 521 §5.15.3: F=0.2 typical for natural gas; F=0.3 for flares with smoking
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 286-1:2010 IT5 — Precision grinding tolerance: 4-18µm (≈0.5% for Ø10-50mm)

inputs.name: Allowable Incident Radiation at Exclusion Zone Boundary
inputs.note: API 521-2020 Table 5 — radiation limits by exposure scenario
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 2768-1:1989 — Nominal/material selection, no measurement uncertainty

inputs.name: Design Wind Speed at Flare Tip (u_w)

formulas: Q_f_kw = relief_flow_kg_h / 3600 * fuel_LHV_kj_kg * combustion_efficiency_pct / 100   // [kW] Total Heat Release Rate (Q_f) Reference: API 521-2020 §5.15.2 — Q_f = ṁ_f × LHV × η_c / 3600
Q_rad_kw = fraction_heat_radiated_F * Q_f_kw   // [kW] Radiated Heat Power (Q_rad) Reference: API 521 §5.15.3 — Q_rad = F × Q_f; F from flare gas composition and smokiness
L_f_m = 0.00325 * Math.pow(Q_f_kw * 0.9478, 0.478)   // [m] Flame Length (L_f) — Brzustowski & Sommer Reference: API 521 §5.15.4.1 — Brzustowski & Sommer correlation; flame length from heat release

U_j_m_s = 20; Mach_j = wind_speed_m_s / U_j_m_s; x_h_m = L_f_m * Math.sin(Math.atan(Mach_j * 5)); x_v_m = L_f_m * Math.cos(Math.atan(Mach_j * 5)); flame_tip_H_m = stack_height_m + x_v_m; flame_tip_X_m = x_h_m   // [m] Flame Tip Location (Horizontal & Vertical Deflection by Wind) Reference: API 521 §5.15.4.2 — wind-deflected flame centre approximation; jet velocity U_j assumed 20 m/s

D_excl_m = Math.sqrt(Q_rad_kw / (4 * Math.PI * allowable_radiation_kw_m2))   // [m] Radiation Exclusion Zone Radius (D_excl) Reference: API 521 §5.15.3 — point source model: E = Q_rad / (4πd²); d = √(Q_rad / 4πE_allow)

D_from_base = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(D_excl_m, 2) - Math.pow(flame_tip_X_m, 2)); H_min_m = Math.max(D_from_base - flame_tip_H_m + stack_height_m, stack_height_m)   // [m] Minimum Required Stack Height for Exclusion Zone Reference: Stack height must ensure 3D distance from flame centre to ground-level personnel ≥ D_excl — API 521 §5.15.3

standards: SFPE Handbook of Fire Protection Engineering 5th Ed.

V1.error_msg: Proposed stack height below minimum required: exclusion zone at ground level is violated — increase stack height to H_min or relocate facilities beyond D_excl

V2.error_msg: Low combustion efficiency at high flow: significant unburned hydrocarbon and black smoke — verify flare tip design and steam/air assist per API 537 §5.4

V3.error_msg: F > 0.30: heavy luminous flame (smoking) — smoking flare radiates more heat; address air/steam assist or switch to enclosed flare to reduce F below 0.20

smart_warnings.message: Exclusion zone > 500 m: major hazard area — review relief system design, consider staged blowdown or enclosed ground flare to reduce peak flow
Flame power > 100 MW: large flare event — noise assessment mandatory; stack structural loading under wind and thermal cycling must be verified per API 560 §7
High wind deflection: flame centre shifts significantly downwind — re-calculate exclusion zone at wind direction perpendicular to access road
Personnel exclusion zone > 200 m: verify no permanent occupied facilities within zone; update HAZOP and site emergency response plan
Combustion efficiency < 98%: regulatory compliance risk — US 40 CFR Part 60 Subpart Ja requires ≥ 96.5% DRE; EU IED requires BAT-AEL assessment

fmea.effect: Proposed stack height below minimum required: exclusion zone at ground level is violated — increase stack height to H_min or relocate facilities beyond D_excl
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.effect: Low combustion efficiency at high flow: significant unburned hydrocarbon and black smoke — verify flare tip design and steam/air assist per API 537 §5.4
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.effect: F > 0.30: heavy luminous flame (smoking) — smoking flare radiates more heat; address air/steam assist or switch to enclosed flare to reduce F below 0.20
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Exclusion zone > 500 m: major hazard area — review relief system design, consider staged blowdown or enclosed ground flare to reduce peak flow
Flame power > 100 MW: large flare event — noise assessment mandatory; stack structural loading under wind and thermal cycling must be verified per API 560 §7
High wind deflection: flame centre shifts significantly downwind — re-calculate exclusion zone at wind direction perpendicular to access road
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: wind_speed_m_s > 15 && flame_tip_X_m > stack_height_m * 0.5

fmea.failureMode: Personnel exclusion zone > 200 m: verify no permanent occupied facilities within zone; update HAZOP and site emergency response plan
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: allowable_radiation_kw_m2 < 3.16 && D_excl_m > 200

fmea.failureMode: Combustion efficiency < 98%: regulatory compliance risk — US 40 CFR Part 60 Subpart Ja requires ≥ 96.5% DRE; EU IED requires BAT-AEL assessment
